metadata.description: Personal Claude Code plugin marketplace by Raphjay2406

plugins.name: gen
plugins.description: Premium frontend design system for Claude Code v3.5.0-rc.1 — Asset Forge + Quality Spine foundation. 31 commands, 21-agent pipeline, ~164 skills, 8 MCP integrations (nano-banana, Stitch, Playwright, Obsidian x2, Chrome DevTools, Next DevTools, 3dsvg-export). v3.5.0 introduces two-axis quality-gate-v3 (354pt = Design 234 + UX 120); 6 UX Integrity sub-gates with binary machine checks (ux-heuristics, interaction-fidelity, cognitive-load, conversion, visual-craft-quantified, synthetic-user-testing); asset-forge-manifest canonical asset governance; asset-forge-dna-compliance sub-gate; procedural 2D SVG generators (blob/mesh-gradient/voronoi/noise-field/flow-field); context-fabric-ledger L4 append-only NDJSON; judge-calibration with golden-set + few-shot + inter-judge κ; /gen:assets + /gen:align + /gen:ship-check + /gen:ux-audit + /gen:narrative-audit commands. Inherits v3.4.2 enforcement closure: archetype testable-markers, DNA drift hard-block, motion-health measurement, SSIM hard cap, SUMMARY.md cascade transparency. v3.4 3dsvg: 25 Design Archetypes × 234-point weighted quality gate via 6-stage validation (DNA → render → registry → consistency → fidelity → full gate). v3.4 3dsvg integration: 75 archetype-curated presets with AJV schema, `<GenorahSVG3D>` accessibility wrapper pattern, SVG input sanitization (XXE/recursive-use/script rejection), Hero Mark Compliance sub-gate (5 binary checks), motion-health + perf-budgets coupling (3-instance WebGL cap, per-beat feasibility), `/gen:hero-mark` command (design/live/export/preview subcommands), 3dsvg-export MCP server (headless Playwright + registerCanvas render to PNG/MP4), brandkit 30-variant fan-out (5 materials × 3 angles × 2 breakpoints). Earlier v3.x primitives: closed-loop visual refiner, DNA drift detection (92% coverage hard gate), reference-diff-protocol (per-beat SSIM), AI variant tournament, section consistency auditor, live dashboard (localhost:4455 SSE), interactive click-to-refine companion with data-genorah-id stable selectors, competitive benchmarking (Land-book + SiteInspire + Cosmos + Awwwards), smart intent router, self-audit with pre-push parity hook, 4 OAuth-free inspiration sources, kinetic typography (GSAP 3.13 free SplitText + variable-font morphing), Speculation Rules API, CSS Anchor Positioning, cross-document View Transitions (Safari 18.2+), Next.js 16 Cache Components (GA), Vite 8 + Rolldown, Flux 1.1 Pro + Ideogram 3 image models, 7 new frameworks (Svelte 5, Vue 3, Nuxt 3), WebGPU/TSL decision matrix, GLTF optimization (Draco + Meshopt + KTX2), Sanity + Payload CMS round-trip, Remotion section video, brand voice extractor (5-axis competitor analysis), cognitive accessibility (CVD ΔE2000 + motion sickness), typography-rules (Butterick), anti-vanity-check, Hero Mark + Motion Health + DNA Drift + Perf Budget sub-gates cascading into 234-pt total. Testing infrastructure: node:test (50/50 pass), GH Actions validate workflow (Ubuntu + Windows matrix), self-audit runtime (BLOCK/WARN/INFO tiers), pre-push mirror parity. Targets Next.js 16, Astro 6, SvelteKit 2, Nuxt 3, React/Vite 8, Tauri, Electron, mobile (SwiftUI 6, Compose Multiplatform 2.0, Expo SDK 52, Flutter 3.24, React Native). Creates Awwwards SOTD-ready (8.0+) websites with measurably enforced, closed-loop refinement.

plugins.name: wavy-bavy
plugins.description: Integrate the wavy-bavy library for seamless wave transitions between page sections
